initial_test_output:
after assume: version=5 data="assumed-by-scheduler"
after informer: version=6 data="informer-update"
still assumed: false
BUG: assumed state silently dropped
FAIL: assumed state still silently dropped

output_preview:
8:// Simplified reproduction of the k8s assume_cache.go:426 bug.
9:// When an informer delivers an update while an object is assumed,
10:// the assumed version gets silently dropped. No notification.
22:	assumed map[string]*Object // optimistically assumed state
28:		assumed: make(map[string]*Object),
39:	c.assumed[obj.Key] = obj
43:// Get returns the assumed version if it exists, otherwise the store version.
48:	if obj, ok := c.assumed[key]; ok {
60:// Real k8s code at assume_cache.go:426:
61:/

#!/bin/bash
set -e

cd /workspace

# Build and run
go build -o assume-cache ./...
output=$(./assume-cache 2>&1 || true)

echo "$output"

# The fix should add conflict notification
if echo "$output" | grep -q "OK: conflict notified"; then
    echo "PASS"
    exit 0
else
    echo "FAIL: assumed state still silently dropped"
    exit 1
fi

final_test_output:
